caption:
You can change your relationship for the better. But it starts with one decision. To take your share. To stop waiting for your partner to go first.

You're a powerful, magnetic, sensual woman. You can literally create life. So yes, you can create the love you want too.

This week, every day, say it out loud:

"I'm powerful. I can create life. I can create the relationship I desire. The power is in my hands."

Are you with me?

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#womenover40 #relationshipcoach #marriageafter40

When your partner disconnects, do you spiral straight into "I'm not enough, I'm not loved, I'll never have what I want"?

Same. Then I discovered my truth.

Life supports me. I'm wanted by all of life. I'm a blessing to life. I'm loved and loveable.

This week, name the old story. Feel where it lives in your body. Notice how old that feeling is. Then write the truth that contradicts it.

You'll feel the shift.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#innerchildhealing #selfworth #midlifewomen

What makes your eyes shine? What fills you up so completely the stars fall out of your heart onto every passerby?

Love is sharing from overflow. Not from empty.

This week, design your extreme self-care:

1. Movement that brings you joy
2. Slow, sensual eating
3. Bed by ten
4. Time with girlfriends
5. Time alone
6. Time in nature
7. Creative expression

Fill your love tanks first. Then give from the overflow.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#selfcareforwomen #womenwellness #midlifewellness

Deep inside every partner there's a hero. Someone who wants more than anything to succeed in serving and loving the person they're with.

They need to feel significant. Without it, they crumble. With it, they rise.

The secret? Make your partner your hero. Appreciate little things they do for you.

This week, every evening write three things you're grateful for about your partner. Then say thank you out loud.

Watch what happens.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#appreciation #healthyrelationships #marriageafter40

You are radiant.

Soft, receptive, wild, messy, authentic. You practice vulnerability, not emotionality. You keep opening your heart and your body to love. You know you're powerful and you use that power wisely. Not overpowering. Magnetising. Melting.

Can you find her inside?

Pick a name for that part of you. Firecracker. Muse. Siren. Temptress. Cleopatra. Something that turns you on and expands you.

Let your partner know your sexy name. Enjoy the ride.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#magneticwoman #femininepower #sensualwoman

Your body deserves your love and attention.

I like to think of mine as a gorgeous child. If I condemn her, she shuts down. If I encourage her, care for her, love her, she opens all of her miracles to me.

This week, go through every part of your body.

What do your legs do for you? Your hands? Your belly that can grow life?

Put your hands on each part. Send gratitude. Send love.

This is the foundation of reclaiming your pleasure.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#bodylove #embodiedfeminine #midlifewomen

Slow is the secret.

Most lovemaking jumps straight into stimulation. But you can't build deep connection at full steam ahead.

Try this. Breathe together first. Eye gaze. See each other's beauty, power, and vulnerability.

Then create a special space. Candles. Soft music. Feathers, silk, fur, your warm loving hands.

Touch slowly. Feather their whole body. Silk sheet. Fur. Fingertips sending love. Massage. Five times each, very, very slowly.

Then it's their turn.

Slow creates space for feelings and vulnerability.
Vulnerability supports connection.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#tantricintimacy #consciouslovemaking #sacredsexuality

Most of us were taught to earn love. To work for it. To deserve it. To deflect the compliment, downplay the gift, apologise for the help.

What if you just received?

Today, let one good thing land. A compliment. A door held open. Tea your partner made. Just say thank you. Look them in the eye. Feel it touch your skin.

Notice what happens in your chest. Notice what softens in your belly. Notice your partner light up when you actually take what they're offering.

This is how you fill your love tanks.
By receiving.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#femininereceiver #womenover40 #relationshipafter40

Your desire is allowed. I know. We were trained to be polite. To not be too much. To hint, to hope, to wait for our partner to read our mind.

But your partner is not a mind reader. And your desire is not a burden.

It's a gift.

This week, tell your partner one clean, warm, specific thing you want. Not a complaint. Not a hint. A desire.

"I want to be kissed slowly tonight."
"I want a walk together on Saturday."
"I want you to hold me when I get home."

How do they respond?

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#sexualcommunication #intimacyafter40 #womenover40

Move and you come alive. Your life force lives in your body. Not in your head. Not in your to-do list. In your hips, your belly, your breath.

When was the last time you moved like nobody was watching?

This week put on one song that does something to you. Close the door. Move.

Dance, breathe and even! make some noise!

Five minutes. Every day.

You'll feel your magnetic Radiant Woman come back online.

Yes?

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#embodimentpractice #sensualmovement #midlifewomen

Your vulva has been holding a lot. Birth. Loss. Numbness. Memories. Maybe years of going through the motions.

She's not broken. She's just been waiting for you to notice her.

I invite you for ten minutes a day:
Sit comfortably.
One hand on your belly, one between your legs. Breathe down into your yoni (tantric word for our genitals). Long, slow breaths.

Tell her, "I'm here. I love you. Thank you."

Notice what softens. Notice what releases. Notice what wakes up.

This is how you reconnect with your sexuality and come home to yourself.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#yonihealing #womenshealth #embodimentforwomen

Before sleep tonight, remember three things you adore about your partner.

Then say it out loud. Even if they're already snoring. Even if you're a bit annoyed at them. Especially then.

The speaking out loud is for you. Your nervous system is listening.

Try it for seven nights. Watch what happens to your eyes when you look at your partner in the morning.

Gratitude isn't a feeling. It's a practice.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#relationshipgratitude #marriageafter40 #healthyrelationships

Tomorrow, dress for the woman you want to feel like.

Not the meeting. Not the school run. Not the laundry. Her.

Lipstick if she wants it. Silk against your skin if you have it. Earrings even with jeans. Perfume and fancy lingerie on a Tuesday.

This isn't about looking good for anyone else. It's about telling your body, "You matter. You deserve beauty. You deserve attention."

Watch what happens to how you move through your day.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#dressforyourself #sensualwoman #womenover40

Hug your partner for a full minute. Every day this week.

No talking. No agenda. No "I love you but did you remember the rubbish bin." Just hugging, breathing together, melting into each other.

60 seconds is the threshold. That's when both your nervous systems drop. Oxytocin floods. Your shoulders relax and your heart starts to melt. You actually start to feel each other.

Most couples haven't held each other like that in years.

Set a timer if you have to.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#hugtherapy #couplesconnection #marriageafter40

Right now, while you're reading this, soften your jaw. Drop your shoulders. Unclench your belly. Let your pelvic floor release.

Feel that?

That's your feminine essence coming back online. That's the magnetic Radiant Woman you've been missing. She doesn't live in the tension. She lives in the softening.

Do it five times a day this week. At your desk. In the car. Mid-conversation with your partner. While doing the dishes.

You won't need to chase your radiance. She comes when you soften.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#nervoussystemregulation #femininesoftness #embodimentforwomen

Sit knee to knee with your partner. Set a timer for three minutes. Look into their eyes. Breathe together. No talking. No fixing. No problem-solving.

Just witnessing.

You'll want to look away. You'll want to laugh, joke, break the spell.

Stay anyway.

Underneath the awkwardness, underneath the daily logistics, underneath every fight you've ever had, there's a person who chose you. And a person you chose.

Three minutes. Once this week. See what comes up.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#eyegazing #intimacyafter40 #conscioussexuality

theme: A Love Note to Your Past Self
caption:
Write a short note to the woman you were five years ago. Tell her what you're proud of. Tell her what you've learned. Tell her the things she was so afraid of didn't break her.

Tell her she's loved.

Write it like you're writing to your dearest girlfriend, because you are.

Read it back tonight before bed.

Most of us are so busy chasing the next version of ourselves we forget to thank the woman who got us this far.

She did her best. She still is.

sexualempowermentforwomen.com

#selfcompassion #lovenotetoself #midlifewomen
